name: wigtn-crew-plugins
description: AI-native development — From idea to Deploy, Zero friction.

plugins.name: public-commands
plugins.description: Core development workflow plugin: PRD generation, plan analysis (digging), implementation, and quality-gated auto-commit with code-review and code-formatter.

plugins.name: ai-development
plugins.description: AI integration plugin for STT (Speech-to-Text) and LLM features.

plugins.name: frontend-development
plugins.description: Complete frontend development solution with 12+ design styles (Editorial, Brutalist, Glassmorphism, etc.), Next.js App Router, React state management, authentication, forms, API integration, testing, SEO, and Tailwind CSS.

plugins.name: backend-development
plugins.description: Backend development plugin with architecture design, NestJS + Prisma + PostgreSQL stack, API/Model/Auth generation, and DevOps (Docker, CI/CD, cloud deployment) guidance.

plugins.name: mobile-development
plugins.description: Complete mobile development solution with React Native (Expo & CLI), iOS HIG, Material Design 3, 11 specialized skills for navigation, authentication, native modules, testing, performance optimization, and App Store optimization.
